final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing interior design illustration of a castle (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a dark Gothic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include tall vaulted arches as focal architectural element
Subject: must include candelabras and iron chains as decorative elements
Scene/backdrop: must include a castle interior with tall vaulted ceilings and stained glass windows
Lighting/mood: must include blood-red light filtering through stained glass windows; needs a mysterious and oppressive atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a blood-red dominant direction — exact saturation and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs heavy shadow treatment — exact grain and contrast are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
